# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  - name: example-service
    url: http://example.com
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: ["https://app1.example.com", "https://app2.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
          headers: ["Content-Type", "Authorization"]
          max_age: 86400
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names: ["apikey"]
routes:
  - name: example-route
    paths: ["/api/*"]
    service: example-service
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 10
          hour: 600
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins: ["https://app1.example.com", "https://app2.example.com"]
      methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
      headers: ["Content-Type", "Authorization"]
      max_age: 86400
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names: ["apikey"]
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 6000
